perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a white dress stands in a Costco, holding a black plastic tray containing three large crab salad sandwiches. She gestures enthusiastically towards the camera. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the sandwiches in their packaging, showing the price labels and the details of the bread and fillings. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting where two women are sitting behind a table. One is the woman from the first scene, and the other is a woman with long dark hair and red tassel earrings. They hold up the sandwich, showing its cross-section and individual ingredients like roe and cabbage. They take turns pointing at the food and making 'thumbs up' gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice describes finding a luxury crab salad burger at Costco and questions the price. Sounds of a busy retail environment are faintly audible in the background. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as two female voices engage in a dialogue. They describe the ingredients—capelin roe, crab meat, cabbage, apple, and celery—with a friendly and energetic tone. (3) The music maintains its tempo as the two voices reach a synchronized conclusion, enthusiastically recommending the product. Sound effects like sparkles and 'dings' are heard during transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top. Decorative Text: '美味豪華 蟹肉沙拉堡' (Delicious Luxury Crab Salad Burger) in large, colorful stylized font. Hook Text: '一個160元!?' (160 NTD each!?) with an emphasis on surprise. (2) Functional Text: '751元' and '480元' appearing over the price tag to clarify cost. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '滿滿的柳葉魚卵' (Full of capelin roe), '超級無敵搭' (Super match), and '超推' (Highly recommended) appearing with emotional stickers to emphasize the review points.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Discovery in store -> Ingredient breakdown at home -> Final recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 5 passers-by visible in the Costco background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black beret and white dress; the other has long dark hair and large red tassel earrings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First, a Costco warehouse with refrigerated shelves and shoppers. Second, a brightly lit home interior with a table and stuffed animals on a shelf behind.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio-like lighting and fluorescent store lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Close-up -> Detailed Review -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an enthusiastic and detailed food review of Costco's crab salad sandwich, justifying its price point through a breakdown of high-quality ingredients and personal taste satisfaction.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product presentation, price discussion, and strong positive verbal recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy dual-host interaction, variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a common social media food review format in Taiwan, using fast cuts and bright text to keep the audience engaged while focusing on 'value for money'.
